meta.title: AI Tour Copilot
meta.description: Tell the copilot what you love and how long you have — it plans a personalized walk through Al Fahidi over the real district.

hero.title: Your tour, made to measure
hero.lede: Pick what draws you and how long you have. The copilot writes a walking route through Al Fahidi's real museums, houses, and alleys — in your language.

result.title: Your walking tour
result.error: Couldn't reach the copilot. Check the connection and try again.
